mapper.sql: id, phone, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, status, last_login_at, last_login_ip, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, status = #{status}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
